metadata.description: Agent Skills for working with Skardi — SQL pipelines as HTTP endpoints. Distributes plugins that teach AI coding agents Skardi's patterns for RAG, hybrid search, and pipeline deployment.

plugins.name: skardi-deploy-and-patterns
plugins.description: Core Skardi concepts (auth, SQLite, pipelines, CSRF, DataFusion SQL dialect) plus deploying Skardi to Sealos via kubectl. Includes ready-to-use K8s manifest, Dockerfiles, Next.js proxy, docker-compose for local dev, and an init-db scaffold.

plugins.name: auto-knowledge-base
plugins.description: Build a hybrid-search (vector + FTS) knowledge base over a folder of docs using Skardi CLI + SQLite + sqlite-vec. No servers, no API keys.

plugins.name: auto-rag
plugins.description: Server-backed RAG over a user-supplied datastore (Postgres+pgvector, MongoDB, or Lance) via skardi-server. Exposes hybrid search as REST endpoints.
